## Issue #6: Build Resend email sender

Create `src/send.ts` — sends emails via Resend API.

### Requirements
- Accept: product config (from_name, from_email, reply_to), subscriber list, email content (subject + HTML body)
- Convert markdown body to HTML (use the email wrapper template)
- Send via Resend batch API to all active subscribers
- Return delivery stats (sent count, any failures)
- Include unsubscribe link in email footer
